prompt: In the implementations/hysteresis/ directory of the ieee-research warehouse, create the generalized_bouc_wen.py file. Implements the Generalized Bouc-Wen hysteresis model, including classic BW parameters (alpha, beta, gamma, n, A), asymmetric terms and IIR filters. Contains the simulate() method for hysteresis simulation and PSO-based parameter identification method. Create another test_generalized_bouc_wen.py containing unit tests. Branch name feat/generalized-boucwen.
title: Generalized Bouc-Wen Hysteresis Implementation
